title: Trash
description: View and manage deleted agreements and files. Items in trash can be restored or permanently deleted.

toast.viewFailed: Failed to view file. Please try again.
toast.downloadFailed: Failed to download file. Please try again.
toast.restoreFailedFolder: Failed to restore folder. Please try again.
toast.restoreFailedFile: Failed to restore file. Please try again.
toast.adminRequired: Admin access required to permanently delete items. Please access this page from the Admin Panel to perform permanent deletions.
toast.deleteFailedFolder: Failed to permanently delete folder. Please try again.
toast.deleteFailedFile: Failed to permanently delete file. Please try again.

deleteModal.understandAgreement: I understand this will permanently delete this agreement
deleteModal.understandFile: I understand this will permanently delete this file
